radar.defender_focus: Identity telemetry, mailbox rules, OAuth grants, session anomalies, and account recovery evidence.

radar.defender_focus: Endpoint evidence, browser token exposure, password reuse, and post-compromise cleanup.

radar.defender_focus: Git history, exposed tokens, stale credentials, and unsafe config files.

radar.defender_focus: Scheduled tasks, services, startup entries, encoded commands, and userland persistence.
radar.build_response: Windows inventory scripts, persistence review, and safe-disable workflows.

radar.defender_focus: Access keys, IAM policies, public buckets, logging gaps, and unused privileges.
radar.build_response: Cloud inventory checks, least-privilege review, and exposure reports.

radar.pattern: Public surface scraping and impersonation risk
radar.defender_focus: Public metadata, profile visibility, brand impersonation, and exposed contact paths.
radar.build_response: Public-surface audit tooling, reporting templates, and evidence capture.
